models.Trail: A named Forest Service trail with computed health stats derived from patrol reports. Includes both list-view summary fields and full detail data.
models.PatrolEntry: A single patrol visit to a trail — who patrolled, when, how many hikers they contacted, and how long they were out.
models.TreeSizeBreakdown: Counts of fallen trees grouped by diameter class: small (<8"), medium (8–15"), large (16–23"), xl (24–36"), xxl (>36").
models.ViolationCategory: A rule violation type observed on this trail and the total count recorded.
models.MaintenanceWorkEntry: A trail maintenance or clearing task performed during a patrol, typed by work category.

relationships: Each Trail has many PatrolEntries in its patrolHistory
Each Trail has treesDown and treesCleared counts broken down by size class
Each Trail has many ViolationCategory totals
